name: agent-issues
description: CLI for managing initiatives, PRDs, user stories, ADRs, and issues.

scripts.build: node --eval "import { rmSync } from 'node:fs'; rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true });" && pnpm --dir site build && tsc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --dir site exec tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json
